Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 3 -1 -1 1 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}...Is it just me, or is the air conditioning in here too high? I feel a little light-headed...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 3 -1 -1 1 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}I haven't been feeling well lately... I couldn't even finish my lunch today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 3 -1 -1 1 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}I think I may have caught a cold...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 3 -1 -1 1 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}I'm sorry, but do you think we could go to the pharmacy?[n]{f 1 1}
